intro: PHARMACOLOGICAL agents mentioned in physiotherapy and occupational therapy communication.
reading: Pharmacology plays a limited direct role in PT and OT sessions, though muscle relaxants are commonly prescribed alongside physiotherapy for conditions involving spasticity, spasm, or severe muscle tightness.

terms.example_en: The doctor prescribed a muscle relaxant to reduce spasm before therapy.
terms.example_ru: Врач назначил миорелаксант для уменьшения спазма перед терапией.
